query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pp.id) as photo_count, MIN(pp.url) as first_photo_url
FROM properties p
LEFT JOIN property_photos pp ON pp.propertyId = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY p.id;
command:

ORDER BY p.id;
